_comment: StackExplainer VO — references the SSL 2026 house voice preset. Scripts drafted via 3-layer protocol (see treatments/stack-explainer-vo.md). Session 10, 23 Apr 2026.

scenes.text: From stock Remotion — to a production engine.
Out of the box — Remotion gives you a stage, a clock, and a tag that plays a file. That's it.
Then we stacked eighteen plugins on top — transitions, motion blur, noise, fonts, media utils. Every cinematic move is a bolt-on.
The design system — palette, scene skeleton, auto-sizing from the voiceover. One pattern — every video.
The voice — one JSON config, one preset. Script in, MP3s out. Per-scene overrides if a line needs a push.
The library — every sound and music bed indexed. Shortlist in the auditioner — paste the path, done.
Beat tracking — librosa finds the phrase starts, and we snap scene cuts to the ones that fit. No tempo changes to the voice.
The envelope — whoosh in, boom out, fade to black. That's how a forty-second explainer ships in one pass.
